response:
1. area of zen garden = πr²  
   area for dining tables = 2 × πr²  
   total area of dining area = 20 × 15 = 300  
   area for dining tables + area of zen garden = 300  
   3πr² = 300  
   r² = 100/π  
   r = √(100/π) ≈ 5.64  

2. radius of fountain = r/3 ≈ 1.88  
   surface area of cylinder (excluding base) = 2πrh = 2π × 1.88 × 1.5 ≈ 17.83  
   cost = 17.83 × 50 ≈ 891.50
